auth.mfaRequired: Two-factor authentication is required. Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.mfaCodeHelper: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. Make sure your device clock is synchronized.
auth.mfaVerificationFailed: MFA verification failed. Please check that your code is correct, your device clock is synchronized, and try again.
auth.invalidMfaCode: Invalid MFA code. Please enter a 6-digit number.
auth.mfaSessionExpired: MFA session expired. Please log in again.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (MFA)
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
mfa.notEnabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for your account.
mfa.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. You'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app when logging in.
mfa.setupInstructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) or enter the secret manually:
mfa.step1: Open your authenticator app on your phone
mfa.step2: Scan the QR code below or enter the secret manually
mfa.step3: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to activate MFA
mfa.activationHelper: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
mfa.setupFailed: Failed to setup MFA. Please try again.
mfa.activationFailed: Failed to activate MFA. Please check your code and try again.
mfa.disableWarning: Are you sure you want to disable MFA? This will reduce the security of your account.
mfa.disableHelper: Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm
mfa.disableFailed: Failed to disable MFA. Please check your code and try again.
